creator: sergei@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Mar 31, 2009 at 19:03, Wesley Shields <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:
> The reasons for removing Getopt::Mixed are it being abandoned upstream
> and it is part of the standard Perl distribution. =A0Since t-prot is
> broken with the change I made and the fix is non-trivial I will revert
> it and put Getopt::Mixed back in the tree (this time not setting an
> expiration date, but leaving it as deprecated).
>
> Sorry about the trouble. =A0I'll have it fixed shortly.

Thanks, Wesley!

Sergei
